title: Client-side events trigger for checkbox selection on each item
excerpt: As I am developing front-end APP, it would be helpful If there is an event trigger for checkbox selection on the item. I have used the monday.listen to listen to client-side events on the monday.com client running this a…

posts.author: Priya (Priyadharshini)
posts.cookedHtml:
As I am developing front-end APP, it would be helpful If there is an event trigger for checkbox selection on the item. I have used the monday.listen to listen to client-side events on the monday.com client running this app. It will be triggered only on new item creation, status change.

Please let us know how to get the details in my APP through events when I select the item in monday.com

Thanks in Advance!
Priya
